title: Bruschetta
description: Our Bruschetta is made from grilled bread that has been rubbed with garlic and seasoned with salt and olive oil.

title: Greek Salad
description: The famous greek salad of crispy lettuce, peppers, olives and our Chicago style feta cheese, garnished with crunchy garlic and rosemary croutons.

title: Lemon Dessert
description: This comes straight from grandma's recipe book, every last ingredient has been sourced and is as authentic as can be imagined.

title: Pasta
description: Our delicious pasta is made from white flour, eggs, and water, tossed in a rich and savory mediterranean sauce.

title: Grilled Fish
description: Freshly caught and grilled to perfection, our fish is seasoned with a blend of Mediterranean herbs and freshly squeezed lemon.
